title: Moai Update
description: This mod adds new features that will absolutely change the game experience
body:
![Update Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88a4846bea8cf2a8c005f0db7d462ff02253f23a.png)

### About
This mod adds several items, blocks and mobs related to moai

**You need to have gekolib mod downloaded for this mod to work properly!!!**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
### Features
All the features that this mod adds

**Items**
- Rock
- Moai Apple
- Moai Totem
- Tooth
- Jaw
- Toothbrush
- Dumbbell

**Blocks**
- Moai Head
- Moai Block
- Moai Leaves
- 
**Mobs**
- Moai
- Moai Golem
- The Rock
- Big Steve
